/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAuroraX86.so -o libAuroraX86.so CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86RegisterInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86InstrInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86InstrEncode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86TargetLowering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86CallingConv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86FrameLowering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86TargetMachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraX86_shared.dir/X86ISelPatterns.cpp.o  ../libAuroraTarget.a ../../Air/libAuroraAir.a ../../ADT/libAuroraADT.a
